tagline: A deployable multi-tenant workspace for models and Agent operations
heroTitle: A source-available auth platform with strict tenant boundaries.
heroBody: This starter ships with login, refresh-token sessions, RBAC, audit logs, Agent execution, Docker assets, and bilingual documentation.
sessionReady: The browser client now uses HTTP-only cookies for backend tokens, while local storage keeps only lightweight UI session metadata such as tenant and locale.
licenseWarning: Default license is PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0. Commercial use and hosted commercial service require separate rights.
